description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On October 15, 2025 at 1:20 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Santa Monica, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on 14th Street near Olympic Boulevard.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northwestbound on 14th Street. Ahead of the Waymo AV, an SUV was stopped facing southwest, partially 
within the exit of a parking lot for 1401 Olympic Boulevard and partially within northwestbound 14th Street’s designated bicycle lane. As 
the Waymo AV passed the SUV, the SUV began to move forward and entered the Waymo AV’s lane of travel, and the front right side of 
the SUV made contact with the rear right side of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in 
autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
